description: Why luxury hotels convert 27% less on Expedia—and what data reveals about the real drivers

carousels.title: The Luxury Hotel Problem
carousels.subtitle: Why luxury underperforms on Expedia
carousels.key_insight: Luxury hotels book 27% less often than budget hotels. But the reason isn't what you'd expect.

insights.headline: The Booking Rate Gap
insights.description: Luxury segment underperforms significantly on Expedia's marketplace

insights.headline: Market Opportunity
insights.description: Annual opportunity from improving luxury conversion rates

carousels.takeaway: Understanding the root cause unlocks a massive revenue opportunity

carousels.title: Myth: Price Matters
carousels.subtitle: Data proves price optimization won't help
carousels.key_insight: Most people assume luxury hotels book less because they're overpriced. The data says otherwise.

insights.headline: The Price Analysis
insights.description: Negligible difference between underpriced and overpriced hotels

insights.headline: Correlation Signal
insights.description: Statistically irrelevant relationship between price and conversions

carousels.takeaway: Price is already at equilibrium. Focus effort elsewhere for ROI.

carousels.title: Reality: Ranking Dominates
carousels.subtitle: Position in search results is the strongest conversion lever
carousels.key_insight: Where a hotel appears matters 5x more than you'd think

insights.headline: Position Effect
insights.description: Booking rate drops 5.22x from top to bottom positions

insights.headline: Trust Signal
insights.description: Position matters more for post-click conversion than clicks themselves

carousels.takeaway: The ranking algorithm should optimize for conversion and quality signals, not just relevance

carousels.title: The Quality Trust Gap
carousels.subtitle: Why luxury travelers abandon after clicking
carousels.key_insight: Luxury buyers expect 4.30★ hotels but get 4.20★. The gap kills conversions.

insights.headline: Expectation vs Reality
insights.description: Luxury hotels underdeliver relative to stated quality. Budget hotels exceed expectations.

insights.headline: Segment Comparison
insights.description: Budget travelers pleasantly surprised. Luxury travelers disappointed.

insights.headline: Experience Matters
insights.description: Returning visitors book 1.34x more often. Trust is the differentiator.

carousels.takeaway: Fix the quality gap and trust signals, and luxury conversion recovers. This is the highest-leverage lever.
